Label: /F10/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum file size for PCAP files
Correction: The system shall support loading PCAP files up to a maximum size of 500MB.

Label: /F20/
Issue: Does not specify the default values for the preprocessor configuration
Correction: The system shall provide default values for the preprocessor configuration: Length scaling: 150, Value scaling: Off, Normalization: None, Autoencoder and PCA are selected, Number of hidden layers: 4, Number of nodes in hidden layers: (256, 64, 32, 8), Loss function: MSE, Number of epochs for the training: 100, Optimizer: adam.

Label: /F30/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of nodes and edges that can be displayed in the network topology graph
Correction: The system shall support displaying up to 1000 nodes and 2000 edges in the network topology graph.

Label: /F40/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of points that can be displayed in the preprocessor results graph
Correction: The system shall support displaying up to 10,000 points in the preprocessor results graph.

Label: /F50/
Issue: Does not specify the update frequency for the performance analysis graphs
Correction: The system shall update the performance analysis graphs every 5 seconds during the preprocessor run.

Label: /F60/
Issue: Does not specify the zoom level limits for the graphs
Correction: The system shall support zooming in and out of the graphs with a minimum zoom level of 10% and a maximum zoom level of 500%.

Label: /F70/
Issue: Does not specify the supported image formats for saving graphs
Correction: The system shall support saving graphs as PNG, JPEG, and SVG image formats.

Label: /F80/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of runs that can be compared simultaneously
Correction: The system shall support comparing up to 5 preprocessor runs simultaneously.

Label: /F90/
Issue: Does not specify the responsiveness criteria for asynchronous interaction
Correction: The system shall ensure that the user interface remains responsive with a maximum delay of 1 second during asynchronous interactions.

Label: /F100/
Issue: Does not specify the types of statistics to be displayed for the input PCAP file
Correction: The system shall display the following statistics for the input PCAP file: Total number of packets, Number of unique devices, Number of protocols used, and Packet size distribution.

Label: /F200/
Issue: Does not specify the window management options for graphs
Correction: The system shall allow users to open, close, and rearrange graph windows independently.

Label: /F210/
Issue: Does not specify the default key bindings for commonly used functionalities
Correction: The system shall provide default key bindings for commonly used functionalities: Ctrl + O for opening a saved session, Ctrl + S for saving a session, Ctrl + Alt + S for saving a session by selecting a file, Ctrl + R for running the preprocessor.

Label: /F220/
Issue: Does not specify the format for identifiers inside a saved session
Correction: The system shall include identifiers in the saved session file in the following format: Program version hash, PCAP file hash.

Label: /F230/
Issue: Does not specify the threshold for displaying a warning when handling large amounts of data
Correction: The system shall display a warning if the selected PCAP file contains information on more than 2 million packets.

Label: /F240/
Issue: Does not specify the format and content of the PDF report for the current session
Correction: The system shall create a PDF report containing the configurations, results, and performance graphs of the current session.
